pipeline.heading: Deploy your Enterprise Brain in 3 structural phases.
pipeline.subheading: From data ingestion to actionable intelligence, our pipeline is built for transparency and power.

steps.title: Establish Knowledge Graph

steps.title: Data Pipeline Integration
steps.desc: Connect existing data lakes and warehouses directly to the brain's ingestion endpoints securely.

steps.title: Configure Agent Boundaries
steps.desc: Define RBAC policies, system prompts, and action scopes for specialized autonomous agents.

steps.title: Validate Action Protocols
steps.desc: Ensure all automated workflows comply with internal governance and risk management frameworks.

steps.title: Activate Enterprise Intelligence
steps.desc: Launch the brain network across your organization with full audit logging and real-time observability.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subheading: Deployment, security, and integration — everything you need to know about the Enterprise Brain.

items.question: How is our organizational data secured?
items.answer: We employ a zero-trust architecture, end-to-end encryption, and rigorous RBAC to ensure your data never leaks into public models or unauthorized departments.

items.question: Can it integrate with our legacy on-premise systems?
items.answer: Yes. The Enterprise Brain natively connects to PostgreSQL, Neo4j, Kafka, and offers secure tunnels for legacy on-premise database ingestion.

items.question: What is the typical deployment timeline?
items.answer: A standard enterprise deployment takes 4 to 6 weeks, beginning with knowledge graph mapping and concluding with fully tested agent orchestration.

items.question: Does it replace our data engineering team?
items.answer: No. It acts as a force multiplier for your engineering team, freeing them from ad-hoc reporting requests so they can focus on core infrastructure.

items.question: How is this different from a standard RAG application?
items.answer: Standard RAG applications lack organizational context. The Enterprise Brain utilizes graph-augmented retrieval and autonomous multi-agent reasoning to answer multi-step operational questions.

items.question: Is it available for VPC deployment?
items.answer: Absolutely. We offer flexible deployment models including fully managed cloud, VPC, and strictly air-gapped on-premises installations.

items.question: Who maintains the underlying models?
items.answer: Our dedicated platform engineers continuously tune the underlying models and orchestrators, ensuring your Brain adapts as new state-of-the-art LLMs are released.

items.question: How does it handle conflicting data sources?
items.answer: The platform's ingestion pipeline uses Medallion architecture principles and semantic resolution to flag anomalies and establish a single source of truth within the knowledge graph.

items.title: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
items.description: Granular permissions ensure that sensitive HR or financial data is only accessible to authorized agents and personnel.

items.title: End-to-End Encryption
items.description: Data is secured in transit and at rest, complying with strict enterprise governance and privacy regulations.

items.title: Native Knowledge Graph Integration
items.description: Powered by Neo4j and Kafka, the Brain processes streaming data and maps complex relationships instantly.
